metadata.name: flattentool
metadata.summary: Tools for generating CSV and other flat versions of the structured data

classes.name: flattentool.exceptions.FlattenToolWarning
documentation: A warning generated directly by flatten-tool.

classes.name: flattentool.exceptions.DataErrorWarning
documentation: A warnings that indicates an error in the data, rather than the schema.

functions.name: flattentool.sort_xml.sort_element
documentation: Sort the given element's children according to the order of schema_subdict.

classes.name: flattentool.sort_xml.XMLSchemaWalker

methods.name: flattentool.sort_xml.XMLSchemaWalker.__init__
documentation:
schema -- the filename of the schema to use, e.g.
          'iati-activities-schema.xsd'

methods.name: flattentool.sort_xml.XMLSchemaWalker.get_schema_element
documentation:
Return the specified element from the schema.

tag_name -- the name of the tag in the schema, e.g. 'complexType'
name_attribute -- the value of the 'name' attribute in the schema, ie.
                  the name of the element/type etc. being described,
                  e.g. iati-activities

methods.name: flattentool.sort_xml.XMLSchemaWalker.element_loop
documentation: Return information about the children of the supplied element.

methods.name: flattentool.sort_xml.XMLSchemaWalker.create_schema_dict
documentation:
Create a nested OrderedDict representing the structure (and order!) of
elements in the provided schema.

Class for traversing one or more XML schemas.

Based on the Schema2Doc class in https://github.com/IATI/IATI-Standard-SSOT/blob/version-2.02/gen.py

modules.name: flattentool.output
documentation:
Code to output a parsed flattened JSON schema in various spreadsheet
formats.

methods.name: flattentool.output.SpreadsheetOutput.__init__
documentation: output_name is given a default here, partly to help with tests,
but should have been defined by the time we get here.

methods.name: flattentool.output.ODSOutput._make_cell
documentation: Util for creating an ods cell

classes.name: flattentool.sheet.Sheet
documentation: An abstract representation of a single sheet of a spreadsheet.

classes.name: flattentool.sheet.PersistentSheet
documentation: A sheet that is persisted in ZODB database.

functions.name: flattentool.create_template
documentation:
Creates template file(s) from given inputs
This function is built to deal with commandline input and arguments
but to also be called from elsewhere in future

functions.name: flattentool.flatten
documentation: Flatten a nested structure (JSON) to a flat structure (spreadsheet - csv or xlsx).

functions.name: flattentool.unflatten
documentation: Unflatten a flat structure (spreadsheet - csv or xlsx) into a nested structure (JSON).

classes.name: flattentool.NumberStr

methods.name: flattentool.NumberStr.__float__
documentation: This is needed for this trick to work in python 3.4
From http://bugs.python.org/issue16535

modules.name: flattentool.schema
documentation: Classes for reading from a JSON schema

classes.name: flattentool.schema.SchemaParser
documentation: Parse the fields of a JSON schema into a flattened structure.

classes.name: flattentool.ODSReader.GrowingList
documentation: http://stackoverflow.com/a/4544699/1846474

methods.name: flattentool.ODSReader.ODSReader.__init__
documentation: loads the file

methods.name: flattentool.ODSReader.ODSReader.readSheet
documentation: reads a sheet in the sheet dictionary, storing each sheet as an
array (rows) of arrays (columns)

methods.name: flattentool.ODSReader.ODSReader.getSheet
documentation: returns a sheet as an array (rows) of arrays (columns)

modules.name: flattentool.json_input
documentation:
This file contains code that takes an instance of a JSON file as input (not a
JSON schema, for that see schema.py).

functions.name: flattentool.json_input.sheet_key_title
documentation: If the key has a corresponding title, return that. If doesn't, create it in the sheet and return it.

functions.name: flattentool.json_input.list_dict_consistency
documentation:
For use with XML files opened with xmltodict.

If there is only one tag, xmltodict produces a dict. If there are
multiple, xmltodict produces a list of dicts. This functions replaces
dicts with lists of dicts, if there exists a list of dicts for the same
path elsewhere in the file.

methods.name: flattentool.json_input.JSONParser.__init__
documentation: Named for consistency with schema.SchemaParser, but not sure it's the most appropriate name.
Similarly with methods like parse_json_dict

methods.name: flattentool.json_input.JSONParser.parse_json_dict
documentation:
Parse a json dictionary.

json_dict - the json dictionary
sheet - a sheet.Sheet object representing the resulting spreadsheet
json_key - the key that maps to this JSON dict, either directly to the dict, or to a dict that this list contains.  Is None if this dict is contained in root_json_list directly.

functions.name: flattentool.cli.create_parser
documentation:
Create an argparse ArgumentParser for our commandline arguments

Defaults are not set here, but rather given in the appropriate function.

(This is split out as it's own function primarily so it can be tested.)

functions.name: flattentool.cli.kwargs_from_parsed_args
documentation:
Transforms argparse's parsed args object into a dictionary to be passed  as
kwargs.

functions.name: flattentool.cli.main
documentation:
Use `create_parser` to get the commandline arguments, and pass them to
the appropriate function in \_\_init\_\_.py (create_template, flatten or
unflatten).

modules.name: flattentool.input
documentation: This file has classes describing input from spreadsheets.

functions.name: flattentool.input.temporarydicts_to_lists
documentation: Recursively transforms TemporaryDicts to lists inplace.

classes.name: flattentool.input.NullCharacterFilter

methods.name: flattentool.input.NullCharacterFilter.__next__
documentation: Remove null characters read from the file.
Avoid _csv.Error "line contains NUL" in Python < 3.11.

classes.name: flattentool.input.SpreadsheetInput

methods.name: flattentool.input.SpreadsheetInput.convert_dict_titles
documentation:
Replace titles with field names in the given list of dictionaries
(`dicts`) using the titles lookup in the schema parser.

Base class describing a spreadsheet input. Has stubs which are
implemented via inheritance for particular types of spreadsheet (e.g. xlsx
or csv).
